summary: Comprehensive testing of Dashboard and Mandi Target features completed. All backend APIs (22 tests) passed 100%. Frontend UI testing verified all features working correctly.

issues: Bar chart shows single large orange bar - may need X-axis labels for multiple agents to be more visible

seed_data_creation: Existing Badkutru target used (5000 QNTL + 5% = 5250 QNTL expected)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard and Mandi Target features fully tested. All CRUD operations working. Role-based access (admin vs staff) correctly implemented. KMS Year filter working on dashboard.

dashboard_agent_totals.details: Returns agent-wise totals for bar chart with total_qntl, total_final_w, total_entries, total_bag

mandi_target_crud.create: PASS - Admin can create targets, Staff forbidden (403)
mandi_target_crud.read: PASS - Both admin and staff can view targets
mandi_target_crud.update: PASS - Admin can update targets, Staff forbidden (403)
mandi_target_crud.delete: PASS - Admin can delete targets, Staff forbidden (403)

progress_bar.details: Shows achieved vs expected with color coding (red <50%, blue 50-75%, amber 75-100%, green 100%+)

kms_year_filter.details: Dashboard respects KMS Year filter for both agent totals and mandi targets

date_range_filter.details: Returns totals for specified date range

duplicate_prevention.details: Cannot create duplicate target for same mandi/year/season (returns 400)

ui_elements.add_target_button: PASS - Visible for admin, hidden for staff
ui_elements.edit_delete_buttons: PASS - Visible for admin, hidden for staff
ui_elements.expected_total_preview: PASS - Shows calculation preview in form
